topic: My old basement television turns on by itself every night and plays a channel that does not exist
title: My Basement TV Turns On Every Night and Plays a Channel That Does Not Exist | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My basement television turns on by itself every night and plays channel ninety nine. There is no channel ninety nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a nineteen nineties Sony Trinitron tube television in a dim basement showing black and white static with a small ninety nine indicator visible at the corner, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nineteen ninety four Sony Trinitron. Rec room. Rabbit ear antenna.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a wood paneled basement rec room with a vintage tube television on a low wooden stand and rabbit ear antennas on top, dim single bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Have not used it in three years.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a dusty Sony Trinitron tube television sitting unused on a wooden stand, dust visible on the top, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed glow under the basement door last summer.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a dim hallway looking at a closed wooden basement door with a soft cool glow spilling from the gap underneath, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Assumed I had left it on.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand reaching for a tube television power button on the front panel, only the hand visible, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: TV power off. Antenna unplugged. Channel display reads ninety nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a vintage television control panel with the power indicator dark and the channel digit display showing nine nine, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand pulling a two pronged television power plug from a wall outlet, only the hand visible, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: TV came on anyway. Picture fuzzy. Black and white.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an unplugged vintage television showing a fuzzy black and white static image on the screen, the power cord visible on the floor, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Recorded the screen on my phone for an hour.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone on a tripod recording the screen of a vintage tube television, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Picture was a static security camera shot of my basement from a low angle. The TV was in the frame. So was I.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a tube television screen displaying a grainy black and white security camera angle showing a basement room with a person seated in front of the same television, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not go in the basement anymore.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a closed basement door from the hallway side with a dim cool glow visible underneath, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I can hear the volume rising through the closed basement door at night.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a closed wooden basement door at night with a cool flickering glow visible at the floor seam, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
